user_scenarios.user_goal: As an operator, verify demand-development cleanup is selected by the Supervisor registry, executed as one bounded Worker action, and stops at the human merge gate.
prerequisites: The unified Supervisor registry and Worker tests are available.
No live service or Codex model call is required.
steps: Create an isolated demand-development run fixture in cleanup phase.
Reconcile one cleanup action through the canonical registry.
Run one Worker lease and inspect the resulting run state.
expected_outcomes: Exactly one bounded cleanup action executes.
failure_signals: Cleanup executes outside a Worker lease.
The run bypasses the human merge gate.
A multi-round orchestrator entrypoint is invoked.
cleanup: Pytest removes the temporary fixture repository.
